ASTROLUPINE-ATTACK_REGISTER_POWER.title: Attack Register (RA)
ASTROLUPINE-ATTACK_REGISTER_POWER.smartD: #Can be [Read] and [Written] by attack cards. Current Read: Deal {Amount} extra damage.
ASTROLUPINE-DEFENSE_REGISTER_POWER.title: Defense Register (RD)
ASTROLUPINE-DEFENSE_REGISTER_POWER.smart: #Can be [Read] and [Written] by defense cards. Current Read: Gain {Amount} extra block.
ASTROLUPINE-DRAW_REGISTER_POWER.title: Draw Register (RP)
ASTROLUPINE-DRAW_REGISTER_POWER.smartDes: #Can be [Read] and [Written] by draw cards. Current Read: Draw {Amount} extra cards.
ASTROLUPINE-TROJAN_HORSE_VIRUS_POWER.sma: #At the start of your turn, takes damage equal to the player's [Attack Register]. Lasts for {Amount} turns.
ASTROLUPINE-ZERO_DAY_EXPLOIT_POWER.title: Zero-day Exploit
ASTROLUPINE-AUTO_MAINTENANCE_POWER.title: Auto Maintenance
ASTROLUPINE-AUTO_MAINTENANCE_POWER.smart: #At the start of your turn, gain block equal to your current [Defense Register].
ASTROLUPINE-ATTACK_ACCUMULATOR_POWER.sma: #At the start of your turn, increase your [Attack Register] by {Amount}.
ASTROLUPINE-DEFENSE_ACCUMULATOR_POWER.sm: #At the start of your turn, increase your [Defense Register] by {Amount}.
ASTROLUPINE-ATTACK_OVERWRITE_POWER.title: Attack Overwrite
ASTROLUPINE-ATTACK_OVERWRITE_POWER.smart: #At the start of your next turn, set your [Attack Register] to {Amount}.
ASTROLUPINE-DEFENSE_OVERWRITE_POWER.smar: #At the start of your next turn, set your [Defense Register] to {Amount}.
ASTROLUPINE-DRAW_OVERWRITE_POWER.title: Draw Overwrite
ASTROLUPINE-DRAW_OVERWRITE_POWER.smartDe: #At the start of your next turn, set your [Draw Register] to {Amount}.
ASTROLUPINE-KERNEL_HARDENING_POWER.title: Kernel Hardening
ASTROLUPINE-KERNEL_HARDENING_POWER.smart: All registers are locked, cannot be written to, and can only be read. Lasts for {Amount} turns.
ASTROLUPINE-EXCEPTION_HANDLING_POWER.sma: #Whenever a Register's value changes, deal {Amount} damage to ALL enemies.
ASTROLUPINE-BOTNET_POWER.title: Botnet
ASTROLUPINE-BOTNET_POWER.smartDescriptio: #At the start of your turn, gain {Amount} Block for each stack of Trojan Horse Virus on enemies.
ASTROLUPINE-COOLING_ARCHITECTURE_POWER.s: #At the start of your turn, if [Attack Register] is {Amount} or higher, draw 2 cards.
ASTROLUPINE-EXPLOIT_ANOMALY_POWER.title: Exploit Anomaly
ASTROLUPINE-EXPLOIT_ANOMALY_POWER.smartD: #At the start of your turn, if you have any Register Overwrite, gain {Amount} Energy and draw {Amount} cards.
ASTROLUPINE-LUPINE_INTUITION_POWER.title: Lupine Intuition
ASTROLUPINE-LUPINE_INTUITION_POWER.smart: #Whenever an enemy is applied with Trojan Horse Virus or Zero Day Exploit, gain {Amount} Block.
ASTROLUPINE-OPERATOR_OVERLOADING_POWER.s: #Whenever you play a card with [Write], deal {Amount} damage to ALL enemies.
ASTROLUPINE-PARALLEL_PROCESSING_POWER.sm: #The value of all Registers are doubled when [Read].
ASTROLUPINE-PRIVILEGE_ESCALATION_POWER.s: #Whenever you play an Attack card, [Write] its damage to your Attack Register. Lasts for {Amount} times.
ASTROLUPINE-READ_ONLY_LOCK_POWER.title: Read-Only Lock
ASTROLUPINE-READ_ONLY_LOCK_POWER.smartDe: #The value of Attack and Defense Registers cannot drop below {Amount}.
